title: Baker's Tools
body:
Bakery: ToolsPlus is a Polymer Mod (100% serversided) that adds custom tools for underutilized materials!

Polymer allows us to have custom textures shipped as a resource pack, however these textures are optional and are only visible if either the client as the resource pack, or the server distributes the resourcepack itself (by generating and distributing manually or allowing polymer to autohost it)

## What it adds!
- Amethyst Tools
  - These tools are brittle as all hell but have an extremely high enchantability (50% more than gold!)
  - They can mine at Diamond Teir as a result of their brittleness
- Copper Tools
  - They exist in a sweet spot between stone and iron tools effectiveness and durability
  - Meant to be a middle ground between the two until you can get iron tools properly  
  - They can mine at Iron Teir, 
  - Mines faster than Iron, but slower than Gold
- Emerald Tools
  - They can mine at Diamond Teir,
  - Slightly better than Diamond Tools with greater enchantability

## Whats Planned
- More Tool Teirs!
- Config options for server owners to selectively disable mod features!
- Splitting into an easy to use library!
  - as part of this split I intend on making it so server admins can make custom items simular to how plugins worked!
